items.text:
1. `schemas/objective.json` authored. Required fields: `slug` (string),
`title` (string), `status` (enum active|closed), `text` (string). Optional:
`done_when` (string). Self-contained: carries all fields needed to regenerate
objective.md without consulting state.json.
(Evidence: `lume schema objective` prints JSON with title "objective".)

2. `schemas/iteration_content.json` authored. Required fields: `id`
(integer), `dod` (object with required `items` array of `{text: string,
checked: bool}`, optional `preamble` string). Optional top-level:
`self_review` (string|null), `handback` (string|null).
(Evidence: `lume schema iteration_content` prints the schema.)

3. `schemas/decisions.json` authored. Required field: `entries` (array of
objects each with `date`, `context`, `decision`, `rationale` — all strings).
(Evidence: `lume schema decisions` prints the schema.)

4. `schemas/retro.json` authored. Required fields: `overall_verdict`
(string), `carry_forwards` (array of strings). Optional: `stage_verdicts`
(array of `{stage, iterations, cost, saved, net}` strings), `done_when`
(array of `{clause, verdict, evidence}` strings).
(Evidence: `lume schema retro` prints the schema.)

5. `lume entities` now lists all seven entity kinds (the three existing plus
the four new). Output is sorted. (Evidence: output has 7 lines.)

6. `validate.validate_entity` accepts a valid instance and rejects an
invalid one for each new schema via the existing vendored validator.
(Evidence: unit tests, one valid + one invalid case per entity.)

7. Full suite green; ≥ 8 new tests (valid + invalid for each of the 4
schemas). No existing tests removed or broken.
(Evidence: 164 tests, 0 failures.)

dod.preamble:
Four new JSON Schema files in `lume/schemas/` — one per structured-data artifact
type identified in 009. No migration, no CLI wiring, no rendering. The schemas
are the contract the subsequent conversion iterations (P9–P12) write against.

New entity names and their artifact files:

  objective         → schemas/objective.json       (per-workstream)
  iteration_content → schemas/iteration_content.json (per-iteration)
  decisions         → schemas/decisions.json        (per-workstream, append-only)
  retro             → schemas/retro.json            (per-workstream, closeout)

handback:
P8 complete. Four schemas authored, 26 new tests, full suite green (164/164).
`lume entities` surfaces all seven kinds. Ready for verdict.
self_review:
Four schema files written, all using the same style as the three existing schemas
(`$schema`, `title`, flat required + properties). Two existing tests that
hardcoded the entity count at 3 were updated to assert membership of the core
three rather than an exact count — correct, since the schema set grows. 26 new
tests (3 EntityKinds + 5 objective + 7 iteration_content + 5 decisions + 6 retro).
164 total, all green.
